Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Organise around shared issues. Find your people. Take action together.

Footer.mission: To change more for the better in our lifetimes than we dare to imagine is possible.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Change doesn't have to be loud to be powerful
Home.description: Find others who share your issues. Take action together. Quiet Riots connects people around shared frustrations and turns complaints into collective action.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Search for any frustration — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. If it exists, we'll show you how many others share it.
Home.useThePivotDesc: See the same issue across all organisations, or all issues at one organisation. Like tango dancers changing direction.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideas, actions, and community — personalised to your time and skills. Small actions add up to big change.
Home.missionQuote: "To change more for the better in our lifetimes than we dare to imagine is possible."
Home.basedOn: Based on the 2014 book Quiet Riots by Simon Darling

Issues.title: Issues
Issues.subtitle: {count} issues across {categoryCount} categories. Find yours.
Issues.noResults: No issues found. Try a different search or category.

IssueDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Document what's happening — go live or share photos, videos, and links.
IssueDetail.riotReelsDesc: Funny and ironic videos that capture the spirit of this Quiet Riot.
IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Passionate volunteers who go deeper — translators, specialists, media leads, legal advisors.

Organisations.title: Organisations
Organisations.subtitle: Browse organisations and see what issues people have with each.
Organisations.noResults: No organisations found for this category.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: A handful of issues typically account for 80% of all complaints. The top issues below are ranked by the number of people affected.

Campaigns.title: Campaigns
Campaigns.subtitle: {count} {count, plural, one {campaign} other {campaigns}} raising funds for change.
Campaigns.noResults: No campaigns found. Try a different filter.

CampaignDetail.topUpFirst: Top up your wallet first to start contributing.
CampaignDetail.createAccountPrompt: Create an account and load your wallet to support this campaign.
CampaignDetail.completedMessage: This campaign has been {status}. Thank you to all {count} backers!

Assistants.title: Assistants
Assistants.subtitle: {count} pairs of AI agents and human organisers helping rioters take action.

AssistantDetail.openRole: The human organiser role is open to anyone with passion for this category. Express your interest below.

Wallet.title: Your Wallet
Wallet.createPromptDesc: Create a free account to load funds and contribute to campaigns that matter to you.

Profile.title: Your Profile
Profile.findIssues: Find issues you care about and join the movement.
Profile.noConnectedAccounts: No accounts connected yet. Sign in with Google or Facebook to link your account.
Profile.deactivateConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? You can reactivate it within 30 days.

GlobalError.description: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified.

ProfileEdit.title: Edit profile
ProfileEdit.skillsHint: Comma-separated. Helps match you with relevant actions.

CookieConsent.title: Cookie preferences
CookieConsent.description: We use cookies to keep you signed in and improve your experience. Analytics cookies help us understand how the site is used.
CookieConsent.essentialDescription: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how you use the site so we can improve it.
